states_list_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns states_list (18wns3q)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select distinct state
from voter_analytics.mrt_party_registration_changes
order by state
) AS "inputQuery-H1"

states_list_length.sql_string:
---- Length states_list (18wns3q)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select distinct state
from voter_analytics.mrt_party_registration_changes
order by state
) AS "inputQuery-H1")

states_list_data.sql_string:
---- Data states_list 18wns3q
SELECT * FROM (select distinct state
from voter_analytics.mrt_party_registration_changes
order by state
) AS "inputQuery-H1"

party_switchers_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns party_switchers (jzz9ga)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    state,
    old_party,
    new_party,
    switched_at
from voter_analytics.mrt_party_registration_changes
where state like '%'
order by switched_at desc
) AS "inputQuery--m"

party_switchers_length.sql_string:
---- Length party_switchers (jzz9ga)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    state,
    old_party,
    new_party,
    switched_at
from voter_analytics.mrt_party_registration_changes
where state like '%'
order by switched_at desc
) AS "inputQuery--m")

party_switchers_data.sql_string:
---- Data party_switchers jzz9ga
SELECT * FROM (select
    id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    state,
    old_party,
    new_party,
    switched_at
from voter_analytics.mrt_party_registration_changes
where state like '%'
order by switched_at desc
) AS "inputQuery--m"

switch_summary_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns switch_summary (1gg3j8s)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    old_party || ' → ' || new_party as party_change,
    count(*) as num_voters
from voter_analytics.mrt_party_registration_changes
where state like '%'
group by old_party, new_party
order by num_voters desc
) AS "inputQuery-Sd"

switch_summary_length.sql_string:
---- Length switch_summary (1gg3j8s)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    old_party || ' → ' || new_party as party_change,
    count(*) as num_voters
from voter_analytics.mrt_party_registration_changes
where state like '%'
group by old_party, new_party
order by num_voters desc
) AS "inputQuery-Sd")

switch_summary_data.sql_string:
---- Data switch_summary 1gg3j8s
SELECT * FROM (select
    old_party || ' → ' || new_party as party_change,
    count(*) as num_voters
from voter_analytics.mrt_party_registration_changes
where state like '%'
group by old_party, new_party
order by num_voters desc
) AS "inputQuery-Sd"
